nodes.name: status.rs
nodes.summary: Defines store status reporting types: CompactionState enum and StoreStatus snapshot struct.

nodes.name: CompactionState
nodes.summary: Compaction state variants: Idle, Running, Emergency (>70% dead space).

nodes.name: StoreStatus
nodes.summary: Snapshot of store state with vector/segment counts, file size, epoch, profile, compaction state, dead space ratio, read-only flag.

nodes.name: store.rs
nodes.summary: Core RvfStore implementation (2766 lines): create/open/ingest/query/delete/compact, kernel/eBPF/WASM/dashboard embed/extract, CoW branching, witness chains.

nodes.name: RvfStore
nodes.summary: Primary store handle owning file, options, segment directory, deletion bitmap, metadata store, membership filter, CoW engine, and witness state.

nodes.name: create
nodes.summary: Creates a new RVF file on disk with the given options and writes the initial manifest.

nodes.name: open
nodes.summary: Opens an existing RVF file read/write, taking a writer lock and booting in-memory state.

nodes.name: open_readonly
nodes.summary: Opens an RVF file in read-only mode without acquiring the writer lock.

nodes.name: ingest_batch
nodes.summary: Appends a batch of vectors and metadata, writes vec/journal/meta segments, updates manifest.

nodes.name: query
nodes.summary: kNN search over all segments using configured distance metric and optional filter expression.

nodes.name: query_with_envelope
nodes.summary: Quality-aware query returning results with a quality envelope (ADR-033).

nodes.name: query_audited
nodes.summary: Query that appends a witness segment recording the audit trail of the read.

nodes.name: delete
nodes.summary: Soft-deletes vectors by id via the deletion bitmap.

nodes.name: delete_by_filter
nodes.summary: Deletes all vectors whose metadata matches a filter expression.

nodes.name: status
nodes.summary: Returns a StoreStatus snapshot of current store state.

nodes.name: compact
nodes.summary: Rewrites file dropping dead space and returns CompactionResult.

nodes.name: close
nodes.summary: Releases the writer lock and consumes the store.

nodes.name: embed_kernel
nodes.summary: Embeds a kernel image segment (up to 128MB) into the store.

nodes.name: embed_kernel_with_binding
nodes.summary: Embeds a kernel image together with a KernelBinding descriptor.

nodes.name: extract_kernel
nodes.summary: Extracts the most recent embedded kernel image and header bytes.

nodes.name: extract_kernel_binding
nodes.summary: Extracts a parsed KernelBinding if one is embedded.

nodes.name: embed_ebpf
nodes.summary: Embeds an eBPF program segment (up to 16MB).

nodes.name: extract_ebpf
nodes.summary: Extracts the embedded eBPF program bytes.

nodes.name: embed_dashboard
nodes.summary: Embeds a dashboard bundle segment (up to 64MB).

nodes.name: extract_dashboard
nodes.summary: Extracts the embedded dashboard bundle.

nodes.name: embed_wasm
nodes.summary: Embeds a WASM bootstrap module segment (up to 8MB).

nodes.name: extract_wasm
nodes.summary: Extracts the most recent embedded WASM module.

nodes.name: extract_wasm_all
nodes.summary: Returns every embedded WASM segment in the store.

nodes.name: is_self_bootstrapping
nodes.summary: Returns true if the store contains a self-bootstrap WASM segment.

nodes.name: branch
nodes.summary: Creates a copy-on-write child store rooted at this store as parent.

nodes.name: freeze
nodes.summary: Marks the store immutable so it can serve as a parent for CoW branches.

nodes.name: derive
nodes.summary: Derives a new store from this one applying a transformation/lineage step.

nodes.name: compute_distance
nodes.summary: Computes distance between two vectors using the configured metric (L2/cosine/dot).

nodes.name: simple_shake256_256
nodes.summary: Internal crate-private SHAKE-256-based 32-byte hash helper.

nodes.name: scan_preservable_segments
nodes.summary: Scans raw file bytes locating segments that must be preserved across compaction.

nodes.name: witness.rs
nodes.summary: Witness/scorecard layer: GovernancePolicy, WitnessBuilder/ParsedWitness, ScorecardBuilder for AGI audit trails.

nodes.name: WitnessError
nodes.summary: Error variants for witness build/parse/verify operations.

nodes.name: GovernancePolicy
nodes.summary: Tool/cost governance policy with three modes: restricted, approved, autonomous.

nodes.name: restricted
nodes.summary: Constructs a restricted policy denying write tools.

nodes.name: approved
nodes.summary: Constructs an approved-mode policy requiring explicit allowlisting.

nodes.name: autonomous
nodes.summary: Constructs an autonomous policy allowing any tool, optionally with cost caps.

nodes.name: check_tool
nodes.summary: Returns a PolicyCheck for a candidate tool invocation.

nodes.name: WitnessBuilder
nodes.summary: Builds witness blobs by accumulating spec/plan/diff/trace and signing the result.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Finalizes the builder into a witness byte blob and header.

nodes.name: build_and_sign
nodes.summary: Builds a witness and signs it with the provided key.

nodes.name: ParsedWitness
nodes.summary: Borrowed view over a witness blob exposing header, sections and trace entries.

nodes.name: parse
nodes.summary: Parses a witness byte slice into a ParsedWitness view.

nodes.name: verify_signature
nodes.summary: Verifies the witness signature with the supplied key.

nodes.name: verify_all
nodes.summary: Verifies signature plus content-hash integrity of the witness.

nodes.name: ScorecardBuilder
nodes.summary: Aggregates witnesses into a percentile scorecard for cost/latency/violations.

nodes.name: write_path.rs
nodes.summary: Segment writer producing on-disk segments: vec, journal, meta, manifest, kernel, eBPF, WASM, dashboard, witness.

nodes.name: SegmentWriter
nodes.summary: Crate-private writer that allocates monotonic segment ids and emits typed segments with framed headers.

nodes.name: write_vec_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a packed vector segment to the underlying writer.

nodes.name: write_journal_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a journal segment mapping vector ids to physical offsets.

nodes.name: write_meta_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a metadata segment containing serialized metadata entries.

nodes.name: write_manifest_seg
nodes.summary: Writes the manifest segment summarizing the current epoch's segment directory.

nodes.name: write_manifest_seg_with_identity
nodes.summary: Writes a manifest segment including a FileIdentity / lineage record.

nodes.name: write_kernel_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a kernel-image segment with size validation (<=128MB).

nodes.name: write_ebpf_seg
nodes.summary: Writes an eBPF program segment with size validation (<=16MB).

nodes.name: write_wasm_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a WASM bootstrap module segment (<=8MB).

nodes.name: write_dashboard_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a dashboard bundle segment (<=64MB).

nodes.name: write_witness_seg
nodes.summary: Writes a witness segment containing audit/governance bytes.

nodes.name: adr033_integration.rs
nodes.summary: ADR-033 integration tests: quality envelopes, budget caps, degenerate detection, adaptive nprobe, security policy, hardening, PoW.

nodes.name: agi_e2e.rs
nodes.summary: AGI container end-to-end tests covering full lifecycle, tamper detection, execution modes, authority levels, resource budgets, coherence.

nodes.name: qr_seed_e2e.rs
nodes.summary: QR-seed bootstrap tests: full round trip with real crypto, signature/content-hash tampering, layered bootstrap progress.

nodes.name: witness_e2e.rs
nodes.summary: Witness/governance E2E: capability report pipeline, restricted/approved/autonomous modes, replay determinism, scorecard percentiles.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: rvf-server crate manifest: Axum HTTP/WebSocket + Tokio server depending on rvf-runtime and rvf-types.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of rvf-server: Axum-based REST API exposing RVF runtime operations with streaming and CLI configuration.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: Server error type and HTTP status mapping for rvf-runtime errors with JSON body serialization.

nodes.name: ServerError
nodes.summary: Server-side error enum convertible to Axum HTTP responses.

nodes.name: status_for_error
nodes.summary: Maps an RvfError to an appropriate HTTP StatusCode.

nodes.name: http.rs
nodes.summary: Axum HTTP router (1630 lines): ingest/query/delete/status/health endpoints, atlas/trace endpoints, fallback HTML, static-asset routing.

nodes.name: AppState
nodes.summary: Shared application state holding the locked RvfStore and WebSocket event sender.

nodes.name: router
nodes.summary: Builds the Axum Router wiring all REST routes to handlers.

nodes.name: router_with_static
nodes.summary: Builds the router with an additional static-asset directory served alongside the API.

nodes.name: IngestRequest
nodes.summary: JSON payload for the /ingest endpoint: vectors with optional metadata.

nodes.name: QueryRequest
nodes.summary: JSON payload for the /query endpoint: query vector, k, optional filter.

nodes.name: QueryResponse
nodes.summary: Response wrapper with ordered QueryResultEntry list.

nodes.name: DeleteRequest
nodes.summary: JSON payload listing ids to delete.

nodes.name: StatusResponse
nodes.summary: JSON projection of StoreStatus for the /status endpoint.

nodes.name: HealthResponse
nodes.summary: JSON payload for the /health endpoint reporting liveness and basic store info.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Server crate entry: re-exports modules and exposes ServerConfig plus open_or_create_store helper.

nodes.name: ServerConfig
nodes.summary: Top-level server configuration (data path, HTTP/TCP bind addresses, options).

nodes.name: open_or_create_store
nodes.summary: Opens an existing RvfStore at the configured path or creates a new one, wrapping it in SharedStore.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Clap-based binary entry point parsing CLI flags into ServerConfig and starting the Axum runtime.

nodes.name: Cli
nodes.summary: Clap-derive CLI struct capturing HTTP/TCP bind, data path, and runtime options.

nodes.name: tcp.rs
nodes.summary: Binary TCP framing layer: request/response opcodes for query/ingest/delete/status with size-limited frames.

nodes.name: ws.rs
nodes.summary: WebSocket live-event broadcaster: LiveEvent payload and tokio broadcast channel wiring for clients.

nodes.name: LiveEvent
nodes.summary: Server-side event broadcast over WebSockets (e.g., ingest/query/compact notifications).

nodes.name: event_channel
nodes.summary: Creates a paired tokio broadcast Sender/Receiver for LiveEvent fan-out.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: no_std + alloc cdylib manifest for the WASM solver: dlmalloc, libm, rvf-types, rvf-crypto; release profile size-optimized (Oz+LTO).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive design doc for rvf-solver-wasm: three-loop adaptive solver, Thompson Sampling, KnowledgeCompiler, ablation modes, WASM export surface.

nodes.name: alloc_setup.rs
nodes.summary: Registers dlmalloc as the WASM global allocator.

nodes.name: engine.rs
nodes.summary: Three-loop adaptive solver core: AdaptiveSolver, ReasoningBank, PuzzleGenerator, acceptance test runner with A/B/C ablation.

nodes.name: SolveResult
nodes.summary: Result of solving a single puzzle (correct flag, steps, solutions, skip mode used).

nodes.name: ReasoningBank
nodes.summary: Slow-loop trajectory store with checkpoint/rollback and promotion of successful patterns.

nodes.name: PuzzleGenerator
nodes.summary: Deterministic puzzle generator parameterized by seed and difficulty range.

nodes.name: AdaptiveSolver
nodes.summary: Top-level solver orchestrating fast constraint propagation, PolicyKernel skip-mode selection, and ReasoningBank/KnowledgeCompiler learning.

nodes.name: solve
nodes.summary: Solves one puzzle using the current learned policy and records a trajectory.

nodes.name: CycleMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-cycle metrics aggregated during acceptance testing (accuracy, cost, noise accuracy).

nodes.name: AcceptanceConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the acceptance test (holdout size, training size, cycles, budget, seed).

nodes.name: AcceptanceResult
nodes.summary: Output of the acceptance test including per-mode cycle metrics and pass/fail verdict.

nodes.name: run_acceptance_test
nodes.summary: Runs the default A/B/C ablation acceptance test.

nodes.name: run_acceptance_mode
nodes.summary: Runs a single ablation mode (A/B/C) returning its cycle metrics.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: WASM cdylib entry with 12 C ABI exports, handle-based instance registry (8 slots), SHAKE-256 witness chain, panic handler.

nodes.name: SolverInstance
nodes.summary: Container for a single solver's state plus cached result/policy/witness byte buffers.

nodes.name: Registry
nodes.summary: Fixed-size (8 slot) registry of SolverInstances exposed through integer handles.

nodes.name: AcceptanceSummary
nodes.summary: Serializable summary of an acceptance run consumed by JS callers.

nodes.name: AcceptanceManifest
nodes.summary: JSON manifest containing per-mode cycle metrics for the A/B/C ablation.

nodes.name: policy.rs
nodes.summary: PolicyKernel (Thompson Sampling, 18 context buckets) plus KnowledgeCompiler signature cache for compiled skip-modes.

nodes.name: SkipMode
nodes.summary: Search skip strategy: None, Weekday, Hybrid.

nodes.name: PrepassMode
nodes.summary: Constraint prepass mode (basic vs advanced).

nodes.name: PolicyContext
nodes.summary: Context features used to bucket bandits (range, distractors, noise).

nodes.name: SkipOutcome
nodes.summary: Outcome of a solve attempt used to update bandit posteriors.

nodes.name: SkipModeStats
nodes.summary: Per-arm safety Beta posterior plus cost EMA used by Thompson Sampling.

nodes.name: PolicyKernel
nodes.summary: Thompson Sampling controller selecting skip mode per context bucket, with optional speculative dual-path.

nodes.name: learned_policy
nodes.summary: Selects skip mode using two-signal Thompson Sampling for the given context.

nodes.name: should_speculate
nodes.summary: Returns a (primary, secondary) pair when top arms are close and variance high.

nodes.name: record_outcome
nodes.summary: Updates posterior and EMA for the arm used given the solve outcome.

nodes.name: CompiledConfig
nodes.summary: Compiled config for a puzzle signature (mode, step budget, confidence).

nodes.name: KnowledgeCompiler
nodes.summary: Compiles successful trajectories into a constraint-signature-keyed cache of skip-mode plus budget.

nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Pure-integer date math (Howard Hinnant), 10 temporal constraint variants, Puzzle, xorshift64 RNG.

nodes.name: Weekday
nodes.summary: Mon..Sun weekday enum with from_index helper.

nodes.name: Date
nodes.summary: Calendar date with pure-integer serial conversion (no chrono dep).

nodes.name: Constraint
nodes.summary: Temporal constraint variants (Exact/After/Before/Between/DayOfWeek/DaysAfter/DaysBefore/InMonth/InYear/DayOfMonth).

nodes.name: Puzzle
nodes.summary: Temporal puzzle: list of constraints plus named reference dates and difficulty.

nodes.name: Rng64
nodes.summary: Xorshift64 deterministic RNG.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: rvf-types crate manifest: no_std core type crate with optional serde, alloc/std, ed25519 features.
